design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash(title+kind+audience+generated_at) -> workflow-command-center. AIDA Check: Hero=Attention, Proof System=Interest, Motion Chapter=Desire, CTA/Footer=Action. Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk primary. Hero Math Verification: clamp headline max-width enforces 2–3 lines at 1120px. Bento Density Verification: compare-grid uses grid-auto-flow:dense. GSAP Motion Selection: pinned-chapter-scroll + hover-physics. Label Sweep & Button Check: Black primary CTA, white secondary CTA verified.
headline: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

site_brief.audience: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations AI assistant
creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

summary: A premium niche landing page for creators and coaches who want to turn live conversations into durable content and repeatable operations using personal AI agents that can operate real apps and reuse a computer-use cache. Includes a long-form field guide, step-by-step workflow, checklists, risks, FAQs, and structured data.
